summary: End-to-end testing of NOVACNKT Business Vertical app. All 9 backend endpoints pass (services=6, industries=6, testimonials=3, blogs=3, plans=3 with Standard highlighted, portfolio=9, profile, payments POST success/404, payments GET list). Frontend: splash navigation, home sections, profile drawer (all 9 items), bottom nav (5 routes), plans page with Standard purple gradient + Pay Now creating real payment with success toast ('Payment succeeded · $149'), and portfolio filter chips + 9-item grid all functional. One React hydration warning found (nested buttons on Plans).

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <button data-testid='pay-now-btn'> is nested inside <button data-testid='plan-standard'>. HTML spec violation; logs error 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Functionality still works but should refactor outer plan card to a div (with role='button' + onClick + keyboard handlers) so Pay Now button can remain a real <button>.

issues: Filter chip row overflows phone frame slightly on right (last chip 'Print' partially clipped). Consider horizontal scroll affordance or smaller chip padding.

action_items: Fix nested-button HTML on /plans: convert outer plan card from <button> to <div role='button' tabIndex=0 onClick onKeyDown> so the inner Pay Now <button> is no longer nested.
Optional: rename data-testid for plan cards to a uniform 'plan-card-{tier}' pattern (currently 'plan-standard' etc.).
Optional: add 'data-testid=filter-chip-{category}' on Portfolio filter chips for testability (currently selectable only by text).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean Pydantic models, proper /api prefix, MongoDB _id excluded via projection, env vars used correctly. No issues.
Plans.jsx: invalid nested button DOM structure (see ui_bugs).
All endpoints serve mocked seed data as expected; POST /api/payments persists to MongoDB and is listed via GET (verified).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test payment row in MongoDB collection 'payments' (user_email=TEST_buyer@example.com) via API; safe to leave or clean by collection drop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 9 tests, 100% pass). Frontend public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Avatar trigger testid is 'open-profile' (not 'profile-avatar'). Plans data-testid pattern is 'plan-{tier-lowercase}' (plan-basic/plan-standard/plan-pro). Pay Now uses 'pay-now-btn'. Bottom nav testids: nav-home, nav-explore, nav-ai, nav-plans, nav-portfolio. Splash uses 'splash-enter-btn' or button text 'Enter the Vertical'. The only known frontend issue is nested-button hydration warning on Plans page.
rca of the issue: Nested button RCA: in Plans.jsx, each plan is a <button data-testid='plan-{tier}'> which makes whole card clickable to switch active plan. Inside the highlighted plan card, the 'Pay Now' is also a real <button>. Browsers/React forbid nested interactive button elements. Mitigation: outer becomes div with role='button' and keyboard handlers.
